Package io.minio.credentials

package io.minio.credentials
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    io.minio
     
    io.minio.errors
     
    io.minio.messages
     
  • Class
    Description
    AssumeRoleProvider
    Credential provider using AssumeRole API.
    AssumeRoleProvider.Response
    Response XML of AssumeRole API.
    AwsConfigProvider
    Credential provider using Amazon AWS credentials file.
    AwsEnvironmentProvider
    Credential provider using Amazon AWS specific environment variables.
    BaseIdentityProvider
    Base provider of LdapIdentityProvider, CertificateIdentityProvider, WebIdentityClientGrantsProvider and AssumeRoleProvider.
    BaseIdentityProvider.Response
    Response to get credentials of BaseIdentityProvider.
    CertificateIdentityProvider
    Credential provider using AssumeRoleWithCertificate API.
    CertificateIdentityProvider.Response
    Response XML of AssumeRoleWithCertificate API.
    ChainedProvider
    Chained credential provider work with list of credential providers.
    ClientGrantsProvider
    Credential provider using AssumeRoleWithClientGrants API.
    ClientGrantsProvider.Response
    Response XML of AssumeRoleWithClientGrants API.
    Credentials
    Credentials contains access key, secret key and session token.
    EnvironmentProvider
    Base environment provider of AwsConfigProvider, MinioClientConfigProvider, AwsEnvironmentProvider, MinioEnvironmentProvider and IamAwsProvider.
    IamAwsProvider
    Credential provider using IAM roles for Amazon EC2.
    IamAwsProvider.EcsCredentials
    ECS Credentials of IamAwsProvider.
    Jwt
    JSON web token used in WebIdentityProvider and ClientGrantsProvider.
    LdapIdentityProvider
    Credential provider using AssumeRoleWithLDAPIdentity API.
    LdapIdentityProvider.Response
    Response XML of AssumeRoleWithLDAPIdentity API.
    MinioClientConfigProvider
    Credential provider using MinioClient configuration file.
    MinioClientConfigProvider.Config
    Configuration of MinioClientConfigProvider.
    MinioEnvironmentProvider
    Credential provider using MinIO server specific environment variables.
    Provider
    Definition of credential provider.
    StaticProvider
    Provider contains constant credentials.
    WebIdentityClientGrantsProvider
    Base provider of WebIdentityProvider and ClientGrantsProvider.
    WebIdentityProvider
    Credential provider using AssumeRoleWithWebIdentity API.
    WebIdentityProvider.Response
    Response XML AssumeRoleWithWebIdentity API.
